summary: Frontend-only Android validation completed: APK exists and app implementation is a real multi-section DJ utility, but reproducible release build currently fails due missing Gradle wrapper JAR.
action_items: Restore/commit Gradle wrapper binary at /app/frontend/android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar so builds are reproducible in CI and fresh environments.
Re-run `./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` after wrapper fix and regenerate /app/releases/Wave.apk from current source.
critical_code_review_comments: MainActivity is functional (dashboard, decks, pads, setlist, notes persistence via SharedPreferences) and not a static starter shell.
activity_main.xml defines four navigable sections and concrete interactive controls consistent with requested DJ flows.
Current repository state cannot prove build success because Gradle wrapper is incomplete (missing gradle-wrapper.jar).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified APK presence and package metadata via aapt (`com.wave.app`, label `Wave`). Source confirms multi-section native implementation. Blocking issue is missing gradle-wrapper.jar preventing local/CI rebuild verification.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: run `./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` in /app/frontend/android. Observed failure: Unable to access gradle-wrapper.jar. Root cause: gradle wrapper properties reference Gradle 8.14.3 but wrapper bootstrap JAR is absent from repo. Mitigation: add the correct wrapper JAR (or regenerate wrapper with compatible Gradle and commit wrapper artifacts), then rebuild and re-verify APK generation.
